title: Cloaker
description: Hides your player tag if you're wearing a leather cap.
body:
### [Here's](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloaking) a similar mod which instead creates a new enchantment which, when put on your helmet, hides your player tag.  
  
## How to use
Simply upload the datapack and the tag of any player who is wearing a leather cap will disappear, taking it off would make your tag visible again.‎

see [here](https://www.commandgeek.com/tutorials/how-to-install-datapacks) for how to install datapacks.

### Both a datapack and a mod, download Cloaker
